 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Tab We're On

1100m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, BM78, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

Stand-out between the top two picks. TRAPEZE WARRIOR last start winner at Sandown Hillside when resuming and comes back to race in town on a Saturday, has solid claims. STOLI BOLLI has placed in two attempts this campaign but disappointed when placing as favourite last start at Moonee Valley, consider. SHE'S AN ARTIST back from 10 week spell and has had a flying start to their career, don't dismiss. VERDOUX has placed in two attempts this campaign and narrowly beaten when heavily backed last start at Caulfield, in with a chance.

Selections

  • 9. Trapeze Warrior (15) $51.00
  • 7. Stoli Bolli (18) $6.50
  • 10. She's An Artist (5) $1.95
  • 19. Verdoux (1) $19.00
